summary: Completed comprehensive testing of real-time surf conditions (Open-Meteo Marine API) and user surf reports features. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Explore page wave badges working after fixing syntax error, SpotConditions component in Map page bottom sheet displays live conditions data correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: Duplicate closing bracket '))}' on line 327 causing syntax error and preventing wave badges from rendering

critical_code_review_comments: Open-Meteo Marine API integration is LIVE (not mocked) - free API with no key required
Wave heights correctly converted from meters to feet (multiplied by 3.28084)
Batch conditions endpoint properly defined BEFORE single spot endpoint for correct FastAPI route matching
SpotConditions component properly fetches and displays real-time data
Community Reports with consensus voting system working correctly
seed_data_creation: Created multiple surf reports during backend testing (TEST_ prefix in notes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time surf conditions fully working via Open-Meteo Marine API. User surf reports API tested. Explore page wave badges display correctly after syntax fix. SpotConditions component shows in Map page bottom sheet with wave height, swell, direction, period, and community reports.

verified_features.GET /api/conditions/{spot_id}: PASS - Returns wave_height_ft, wave_direction, swell_height_ft, wave_period, updated_at from Open-Meteo Marine API
verified_features.GET /api/conditions/batch?spot_ids=: PASS - Returns conditions for multiple spots with conditions_label
verified_features.conditions_label mapping: PASS - Labels (Flat, Knee High, Waist High, Chest High, etc.) match wave height ranges correctly
verified_features.POST /api/surf-reports: PASS - Creates user surf report with wave_height, conditions, crowd_level, rating, notes
verified_features.GET /api/surf-reports/today/{spot_id}: PASS - Returns today's reports with consensus_conditions, consensus_crowd, average_rating
verified_features.GET /api/surf-reports/spot/{spot_id}: PASS - Returns recent reports for a spot
verified_features.explore_page_wave_badges: PASS - 4.3ft, 3.1ft badges visible on Popular Spots cards
verified_features.explore_page_conditions_labels: PASS - 'Chest High', 'Waist High' labels visible on spot cards
verified_features.SpotConditions_in_bottom_sheet: PASS - Shows Current Conditions (wave height, swell, direction, period) and Community Reports section

explore_page: Popular Spots grid with 4 spot cards
Wave height badges (4.3ft, 3.1ft, 3ft) in top-right corner of cards
Conditions labels (Chest High, Waist High) in card footer
map_page_bottom_sheet: Current Conditions section with Knee High badge
Community Reports section with '2 today' badge
